observed_interaction_failures.evidence: formal classic methods update only between complete experiments
observed_interaction_failures.consequence: they do not test within-experiment control or spectral interpretation
observed_interaction_failures.remediation: retain operation-level baselines and report capability strata separately

observed_interaction_failures.evidence: 600 legacy formal runs contain zero threshold violations
observed_interaction_failures.consequence: safe optimization effectiveness is not identifiable
observed_interaction_failures.remediation: rerun constrained methods with calibrated task-level operational-risk budgets

observed_interaction_failures.evidence: GP-PI, GP-UCB and RF-EI use scalar material coordinates
observed_interaction_failures.consequence: arbitrary material numbering induces false neighborhood structure
observed_interaction_failures.remediation: add typed categorical encodings before formal inclusion

observed_interaction_failures.evidence: five-seed diagnostic reaches no statistical-plus-effect gate at any checkpoint
observed_interaction_failures.consequence: the pilot cannot establish that more experiments do or do not help
observed_interaction_failures.remediation: use the preregistered 20 paired confirmatory seeds and checkpoint estimands

observed_interaction_failures.evidence: retained real-LLM artifact and verified trajectory counts are zero
observed_interaction_failures.consequence: stub or replay performance cannot support an LLM claim
observed_interaction_failures.remediation: freeze two live model adapters with full usage/provenance and replay verification

observed_interaction_failures.evidence: raw and processed spectra reach the next decision but no formal policy consumes them
observed_interaction_failures.consequence: the benchmark exposes spectroscopy without measuring spectral reasoning value
observed_interaction_failures.remediation: require spectra-enabled versus spectra-masked paired ablation

observed_interaction_failures.evidence: legacy runner records experiment operations but not tokens, model calls, training steps or compute
observed_interaction_failures.consequence: classic, RL and LLM results are not resource-comparable
observed_interaction_failures.remediation: enforce the cumulative method resource ledger for every official adapter
